tooltip.radiationzones.radiation_wand: Left-click block = pos 1, right-click block = pos 2. Then /radiationzone create <name> <level>. Type /radiation for help.
tooltip.radiationzones.lugols_potion: Drink to gain temporary protection from radiation. Type /radiation for help.
tooltip.radiationzones.gas_mask_empty: Wear in the head slot. Right-click while holding a Filter to install it.
tooltip.radiationzones.gas_mask_help: Sneak + right-click to eject the installed filter.
tooltip.radiationzones.filter.basic: Basic Filter — short life, blocks 60% of radiation damage.
tooltip.radiationzones.filter.industrial: Industrial Filter — long life, full radiation protection.
tooltip.radiationzones.filter.hazmat: Hazmat Filter — very long life, full protection + brief Resistance I overflow.
command.radiationzones.zone_safe_created: Created safe zone '%s' (%s, size %s, level %s) — radiation OUTSIDE the bounds
command.radiationzones.no_selection: Select two positions with the Radiation Wand first
command.radiationzones.list_dynamic: spread: %s b/min  decay: %s b/min  level decay: %s min  max radius: %s
command.radiationzones.set_spread: Zone '%s' spread rate set to %s blocks/min
command.radiationzones.set_decay: Zone '%s' decay rate set to %s blocks/min
command.radiationzones.set_level_decay: Zone '%s' level decay set to %s minutes/level
command.radiationzones.set_max_radius: Zone '%s' max spread radius set to %s blocks
bossbar.radiationzones.zone: Radiation Zone — Level %s | %ss before heavy damage
bossbar.radiationzones.mask_protected: Radiation Zone — Level %s | Gas Mask filtering
bossbar.radiationzones.outside_zone: Outside Safe Zone — Level %s | %ss before heavy damage
bossbar.radiationzones.outside_damage: Outside Safe Zone — Level %s | TAKING DAMAGE
bossbar.radiationzones.outside_mask_prot: Outside Safe Zone — Level %s | Gas Mask filtering
bossbar.radiationzones.outside_mask_part: Outside Safe Zone — Level %s | Basic Filter (partial)
